app.title: SurfMarket
app.meta_description: Find the best surf teachers and classes

about.title: About SurfMarket
about.subtitle: Your bridge to the perfect wave.
about.what_is_desc: SurfMarket is a digital marketplace connecting passionate surfers with experienced instructors. Whether you are catching your very first wave or you are an advanced surfer looking to refine your technique, our platform provides a safe and easy way to find the right class for your skill level.
about.how_works_desc: Students can seamlessly browse through available classes filtering by location, difficulty level, and class type. Once you find the perfect match, you can book it instantly. For instructors, SurfMarket provides a streamlined dashboard to manage advertisements, track earnings, and coordinate with pupils.
about.mission_desc: We aim to democratize access to high-quality surfing education by creating a transparent, community-driven platform where instructors can thrive and students can learn safely.

home.hero_desc: Connect with professional surf teachers and book your next adventure.
home.step1_desc: Browse our marketplace to find the perfect instructor for your skill level.
home.step2_desc: Choose a time that works for you and secure your spot instantly.
home.step3_desc: Meet your instructor at the beach and improve your surfing skills.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need support? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.

policies.title: Policies & Terms
policies.privacy_1_desc: When you use SurfMarket, we collect information that you provide to us directly, such as your name, email address, and payment information when you book a surf class. We also collect data regarding your usage of the platform to improve our services.
policies.privacy_2_desc: We use the information we collect to facilitate bookings between users and surf instructors, process payments, and communicate with you about your account and upcoming classes.
policies.privacy_3_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
policies.terms_1_desc: By accessing and using SurfMarket, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
policies.terms_2_desc: All bookings are subject to availability. Cancellation policies, refunds, and rescheduling are determined independently by each instructor. Please contact your instructor directly to understand their specific cancellation and refund policy.
policies.terms_3_desc: SurfMarket acts solely as a marketplace connecting students with independent surf instructors. Surf instructors are independent contractors, and SurfMarket is not liable for any injuries, damages, or losses incurred during classes.

levels.title: Difficulty Levels
levels.subtitle: Understand the 9-tier difficulty scale used for classes.
levels.level_1_desc: Complete beginner. No prior experience with the skill. Learning the absolute basics and familiarizing with the environment and equipment.
levels.level_2_desc: Understands the basic fundamentals. Can perform simple, controlled movements in a highly controlled, beginner-friendly setting.
levels.level_3_desc: Gaining confidence and consistency. Linking basic techniques together and starting to explore slightly more varied situations.
levels.level_4_desc: Comfortable with core skills. Able to handle standard, easy scenarios independently and beginning to refine technique.
levels.level_5_desc: Solid foundation. Able to adapt techniques to moderate challenges and perform with consistency without constant supervision.
levels.level_6_desc: Highly confident in standard situations. Starting to explore advanced techniques and challenging environments.
levels.level_7_desc: Strong technical proficiency. Confident in complex and variable conditions, able to adapt quickly and effectively.
levels.level_8_desc: Highly skilled and experienced. Confident in almost all situations, including highly challenging or technical environments.
levels.level_9_desc: Master-level control. Exceptional proficiency, able to handle extreme conditions and execute with perfect precision.

manageAds.no_pupils: No pupils have booked this class yet.

instructors.no_results: No instructors found matching your search.

gear_guide.title: Beginner Surf Gear Guide
gear_guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know before hitting the waves.
gear_guide.wetsuit_desc: The Cantabrian Sea can be chilly! To stay warm and comfortable during your lesson, choosing the right wetsuit is critical.
gear_guide.wetsuit_summer: Summer (July - September): A 3/2mm or 4/3mm wetsuit is perfect. The water is around 20°C (68°F).
gear_guide.wetsuit_spring: Spring/Autumn: A solid 4/3mm wetsuit is highly recommended.
gear_guide.wetsuit_winter: Winter: You will definitely need a 5/4/3mm suit along with booties and a hood!
gear_guide.wetsuit_footer: Most of our instructors will provide a wetsuit as part of the class, but if you're renting gear on your own, always ask the shop for the appropriate thickness based on the season.
gear_guide.boards_desc: If you are just starting out, the board you choose will make or break your first experience.
gear_guide.boards_foam: Foam Boards (Soft-tops): These are the ultimate beginner boards. They are highly buoyant, making it incredibly easy to catch waves and stand up. Plus, their soft material prevents injuries if you happen to wipe out and get hit by the board.
gear_guide.boards_hard: Hard Boards (Fiberglass/Epoxy): These are for intermediate to advanced surfers. They are faster and more maneuverable but offer less buoyancy and stability. Wait until you can comfortably stand and turn on a foam board before upgrading!
gear_guide.essentials_desc: Don't forget a strong leash to keep your board attached to you, and a fresh coat of surf wax on the top of the board to keep your feet from slipping off!
gear_guide.rentals_desc: Get the best gear from our trusted local partners before you hit the water.
